transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Morning. I sent an international transfer on Friday and it hasn't been received. It's now Monday. My business partner is waiting on it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: International transfers — okay. Can I get your name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me look at this... For international transfers, there's a separate team that handles those. One moment.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Before you transfer me — can you at least confirm the payment left my account?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It shows a debit, yes. I really need to get the international team for this.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: How long might this take to resolve?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: They'll be best placed to tell you that. Might be a wait. Good luck. Transferring now.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity before accessing account
transferred without providing any case reference or setting proper expectations
did not log call details or take any preliminary action before transfer
dismissive farewell — 'good luck' inappropriate in a customer service context
